chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Times When Intercourse is Disliked

text: 4406 - رَوَى سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ اَلْجَعْفَرِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ: "مَنْ أَتَى أَهْلَهُ فِي مُحَاقِ اَلشَّهْرِ فَلْيُسَلِّمْ لِسِقْطِ اَلْوَلَدِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4406 - Sulaiman bin Ja'far al-Ja'fari narrated from Abu al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as), that he said: "Whoever approaches his wife during the waning phase of the moon, let him be prepared for the miscarriage of the child."
